codeReview.summary: The HR & Payroll section in frontend-handoff is substantially expanded and now documents endpoint map, user flows, lifecycle tables, DTO contracts, formula semantics, and UI/error handling guidance aligned with implemented APIs. Coverage includes employee/salary templates, leave, attendance, payroll run lifecycle, accounting payment endpoints, and payslip construction guidance.

summary: Pass. Documentation feature satisfies VAL-DOC-007 expectations with comprehensive frontend-consumable contracts and flows.
